title: acer pseudosieboldianum var. microsieboldianum
intro: Acer pseudosieboldianum var. microsieboldianum, also known as the Korean maple or small-siebold maple, is a variety of the Acer pseudosieboldianum tree species, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and other respiratory issues. The plant is believed to possess antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved respiratory health, and boosted immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Acer pseudosieboldianum var. microsieboldianum are often dried and made into tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
